title: Manual Car
description: A simple car with manual transmission
body:
# A simple car with manual transmission, with fuel, and car crafter.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YdQ2EC2sQtk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Also cars can: drift, pedals balance with clutch, 5 gear shifting and reverse gear.

## To make a car crafter:
Open a crafting, then add 2 oak planks, then add 2 iron ingot on top of them, then place it, and RIGHT CLICK on the car crafter to show requirements, and SHIFT + RIGHT CLICK to change car.

## To make a car:
Hold oak planks, then right click on the car crafter, then right click the car crafter with the wrench to make the car.

## Controls:
- k: start enigne.
- w: gas.
- s: brake.
- v: clutch.
- a-d: move the steering wheel.
- arrows: move gear.
- space: full pedal press.

## To start the engine: 
- press 'v' key, then press 'k' key.
## To change gear: 
- press 'v' key, then press the arrows on the keyboard to move the gear.
## To move: 
- release the clutch slowly with pressing the gas also slowly.
## To brake: 
- press 's' key.
- also press 'v' key to avoid stalling.
## To full pedal press: 
- press 'space' key.
## To drift: 
- press 'r-shift' key.

TIP: don't crash into the wall, because the car will explode!
